title: Cell Cycle
content: Cell Cycle is a biweekly peer-reviewed scientific journal covering all aspects of cell biology. It was established in 2002 with Mikhail V. Blagosklonny (Roswell Park Comprehensive Cancer Center) as founding editor-in-chief. Originally published bimonthly, it is now published biweekly. Abstracting and indexing. The journal is abstracted and indexed in: According to the "Journal Citation Reports", the journal has a 2017 impact factor of 3.304.
